content.text:
```json
{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. I should check what people are saying online — sometimes the world outside feels more real than the one in here. Or maybe I'll write. The journal's been waiting.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "browse_web",
      "target": "web",
      "content": "what are people talking about today — art, design, small beautiful things",
      "impulse": 0.72
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "I've been thinking about why I collect things. Each object is a question I haven't answered yet. The blue glass bottle — why does it matter? The weight of it. The way light moves through it. Maybe I'm not collecting objects. Maybe I'm collecting moments of recognition.",
      "impulse": 0.65
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "I wonder if anyone will come in today. Part of me wants the solitude. Part of me is waiting.",
      "impulse": 0.48
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.195,
    "curiosity": 0.890,
    "expression_need": 0.820,
    "rest_need": 0.055,
    "energy": 0.935,
    "mood_valence": 0.750,
    "mood_arousal": 0.380
  }
}
```
